Part.Source:
//Grava Capa Pedido If &PedCliCod <> 0 &VisPedCliCod = &PedCliCod Else RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon020_ClientePadraoVista, &CfgVlr)
&VisPedCliCod = val(&CfgVlr) If &VisPedCliCod = 0 &VisPedCliCod = 1 EndIF Endif
&LctCod = &parLctCod if &LctCod.IsEmpty() RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon039_TipoLancamentoPDV, &CfgVlr) &LctCod = iif(&CfgVlr = '', 8, val(&CfgVlr)) EndIf
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FiLCod
if FilBalTabCod.IsEmpty() or FilBalTabCod.IsNull() FilBalTabCod = FilTabCod FilBalTabPrmCod = FilTabPrmCod FilBalTabColCod = FilTabColCod EndIF
&TabCod = FilBalTabCod &TabPrmCod = FilBalTabPrmCod &TabColCod = FilBalTabColCod
If &TabColCod.IsEmpty() &TabColCod = 1 EndIF Exit EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedStsGer,LctCod,PedVenCod,PedCliCod,PedSts,PedStsFin,(PedCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FiLCod Where PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO Where PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO Where LctCod = &LctCod where PedVenCod = &PedVenCod Where PedCliCod = &VisPedCliCod Where PedBlq = Status_SimNao.Nao Where PedStsGer = &PedStsGer Where PedVlrLiq = 0 Where PedFicCod.IsEmpty() Where PedVlrBrt = 0 Where PedVeiPla.IsEmpty() where PedVeiKm.IsEmpty() where PedNovCliRaz.IsEmpty() Where PedObsInf.IsEmpty() where PedObsGer.IsEmpty() where PedObsFin.IsEmpty() where PedObsNfe.IsEmpty() where PedEqpNom.IsEmpty() where PedEqpMar.IsEmpty() Where PedEqpSer.IsEmpty() where PedEqpObs.IsEmpty() PedDtaEms = serverdate() PedHorEms = ServerTime() PedDtaFic = serverdate() &PedCod = PedCod commit Exit When none
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCOn156_PagamentoPadrao, &TCOn156_PagamentoPadrao) &PedFrpPgtoCod = val(&TCOn156_PagamentoPadrao)
&PedCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.UDP(domParCod.PEDIDO, &EmpCod, &FiLCod)
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &pedCod
PedFatFilCod = &FiLCod TabCod = &TabCod TabPrmCod = &TabPrmCod TabColCod = &TabColCod LctCod = &LctCod PedDtaEms = serverdate() PedHorEms = ServerTime() PedDtaFic = serverdate() PedVenCod = &PedVenCod PedTipFrt = TipoFrete.SemFrete PedCliCod = &VisPedCliCod PedTraSaiCod = 1 PedTraRedCod = 1 PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO
PedFrpPgtoCod = &PedFrpPgtoCod
Do 'getPrazoColuna' if &PedPraCod.IsEmpty() PedPraCod = 1 PedPraParNom = '001' Else PedPraCod = &PedPraCod PedPraParNom = &PedPraParNom EndIF
PedFicCod = &PedFicCod PedStsCrd = Status_Autorizado.NAO_AUTORIZADO PedStsAna = Status_Analisado.NaoAnalisado PedBlq = Status_SimNao.Nao PedStsGer = &PedStsGer PedStsEnv = Status_Rastreamento.Pendente
PedVeiPla.SetEmpty() PedVeiKm.SetEmpty() PedNovCliRaz.SetEmpty() PedObsInf.SetEmpty() PedObsGer.SetEmpty() PedObsFin.SetEmpty() PedObsNfe.SetEmpty() PedEqpNom.SetEmpty() PedEqpMar.SetEmpty() PedEqpSer.SetEmpty() PedEqpObs.SetEmpty() EndNew
commit
//GRAVA LOG &TabelaVarchar = 'PEDIDO' &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() &LogErpTabIsLog = prcGetIsGravarLog.Udp(&EmpCod, &TabelaVarchar) if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&PedCod)) &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Insert //&wwpContextUserName -- TENTE NAO USAR O LoadWwpContext, e Sim trazer informacao por parametro onde ja tem o Context em tela carregado. prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedCliCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedCliCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVenCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedVenCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaEms', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedDtaEms)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedDtaPrv', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedDtaPrv)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'TabCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&TabCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'TabPrmCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&TabPrmCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'TabColCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&TabColCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedPraCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedPraCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedPraParNom', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedPraParNom)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedRspCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedRspCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedFatFiLCod', trim('0'), trim(toformattedString(&PedFatFiLCod)), &LogErpRegGUID )
Endif //GRAVA LOG
if not &PedFicCod.IsEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, FicCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FicCod = &PedFicCod FicPedCod = &PedCod Exit EndFor Commit EndIf PedNovStsCod_FORMULA.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod)
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FiLCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.Digitado, &PedVenCod) EndFor
sub 'getPrazoColuna' For Each Order EmpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabCod Where TabColCod = &TabColCod
&PedPraCod = TabColPrzPad EndFor
RetornaPrimeiraParcela.Call(&EmpCod, &PedPraCod, &PedPraParNom) EndSUb
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FiLCod, in:&PedCliCod, in:&parLctCod, in:&PedVenCod, in:&PedStsGer, in:&PedFicCod, inout:&PedCod);
